leadText: Ruin Valley (Japanese: いせきのたに Ruin Valley) is a route in the Sevii Islands. The Dotted Hole is situated in the central area of the route.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Ruin Valley, at two squares tall and two squares wide, is the only route in the Sevii Islands and in Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen that's more than one square in both dimensions on the Town Map . The background music used for Ruin Valley (as well as various other routes in the Sevii Islands) is the same as that of Route 42 . This area contains the only Sun Stone in Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen. Likewise, there is only one Pokémon obtainable in these games that can evolve with it: Gloom . In LeafGreen, it is not usable on any available Pokémon without trading, due to Gloom being exclusive to FireRed, while Sunkern is only available by breeding the Shadow Sunflora from Pokémon Colosseum or trading one over from Pokémon Emerald .
